title: Public Identity, Privacy, Security, and Reputation Boundaries · Hiring Decision Lens: Publication Review
summary: A learner is told to make everything public, revealing contact details, location patterns, secrets, client material, protected identity, private history, and unsafe availability. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the publication review increment in public-identity threat and disclosure model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, caus…
objectives: Run content, history, secret, link, permission, accessibility, and changed-audience checks before and after publication.
Configure appropriate names, emails, account recovery, commit identity, domains, and contact channels with explicit tradeoffs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Publication Review · Theory Publication Review
steps.instruction:
theory case — A public profile leaks private email, precise location, commit identity, client screenshots, API history, availability, and a protected personal detail. The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Run content, history, secret, link, permission, accessibility, and changed-audience checks before and after publication.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Publication Review contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Publication Review · Theory Publication Review.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for run content, history, secret, link, permission, accessibility, and changed-audience checks before and after publication. For Predict Publication Review · Theory Publication Review, keep Publication Review connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A public profile leaks private email, precise location, commit identity, client screenshots, API history, availability, and a protected personal detail. The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Run content, history, secret, link, permission, accessibility, and changed-audience checks before and after publication.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Publication Review condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Disability Discrimination and Employment Decisions — Controls U.S.-specific applicant accommodation, confidentiality, pre-offer inquiry, and employment-decision boundaries while requiring local qualified guidance elsewhere.

The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Run content, history, secret, link, permission, accessibility, and changed-audience checks before and after publication.

For Predict Publication Review · Theory Publication Review, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: A repository set private after exposure restores confidentiality.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A public profile leaks private email, precise location, commit identity, client screenshots, API history, availability, and a protected personal detail. The worked example variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Run content, history, secret, link, permission, accessibility, and changed-audience checks before and after publication. A defensible solution applies Publication Review, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to public-identity threat and disclosure model.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-2
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A repository set private after exposure restores confidentiality. This fails the Publication Review contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: EEOC Disability Discrimination and Employment Decisions (U.S. federal guidance reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls U.S.-specific applicant accommodation, confidentiality, pre-offer inquiry, and employment-decision boundaries while requiring local qualified guidance elsewhere.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run content, history, secret, link, permission, accessibility, and changed-audience checks before and after publication.
